Hero.description: We create high-performance digital experiences by merging minimalist design with cutting-edge technology to scale your business to the next level.

Services.title: Specialized Services
Services.description: We build solid, visually striking technical solutions to power every stage of your digital growth.
Services.websitesDesc: We build modern, robust, scalable websites designed to support your business growth.
Services.landingDesc: Built with a focus on SEO, performance, and clear structure to maximize conversions.
Services.ecommerceDesc: Online sales ecosystems optimized for a smooth, secure user experience.

WhyUs.title: Why choose us
WhyUs.designDesc: We don't use templates. Every site is designed from scratch to reflect your business's unique identity.
WhyUs.responsiveDesc: Your site adapts to any device, from phones to ultra-wide monitors.
WhyUs.securityDesc: Built on solid foundations that protect your site and keep it running reliably.

Process.title: Our Process
Process.step1Desc: We receive the project details and review the information provided.
Process.step2Desc: We create a visual design based on wireframes, prototypes, and the project's structure.
Process.step3Desc: We build the solution with the latest technologies, ensuring speed and security.
Process.step4Desc: Final quality checks and go-live under supervision.

FAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.q3: How long does a project take?
FAQ.a3: Timing depends on complexity. A website can be ready in one week, while an ecommerce project usually takes 4 to 6 weeks.
FAQ.a4: Yes—we offer monthly support plans to keep your site updated, secure, and running at 100%.

Contact.title: Ready to take your project to the next level?

Footer.tagline: Design and digital development studio focused on creating products that define the future of brands.

Form.title: Your project
Form.description: We'll review your idea and get back to you soon.
Form.projectDescriptionPlaceholder: Tell us more about your project...

Toasts.success: Thank you! Your project was submitted successfully.
Toasts.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

Validation.fullNameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters.
